title: DORA Metrics (Proxy)
description: DORA-style metrics approximated from dev-loop span data

panels.title: Runs Per Day (Deployment Frequency Proxy)
panels.query: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', TO_TIMESTAMP(_timestamp / 1000000)) as day, COUNT(DISTINCT trace_id) as runs FROM default WHERE service_name = 'dev-loop' AND operation_name LIKE 'tb%.run' AND _timestamp >= CAST(NOW() - INTERVAL '30 DAYS' AS BIGINT) / 1000 GROUP BY day ORDER BY day

panels.title: Average Lead Time (seconds)
panels.query: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', TO_TIMESTAMP(_timestamp / 1000000)) as day, ROUND(AVG(CAST(duration AS DOUBLE) / 1000000), 1) as avg_lead_time_s FROM default WHERE service_name = 'dev-loop' AND operation_name LIKE 'tb%.run' AND _timestamp >= CAST(NOW() - INTERVAL '30 DAYS' AS BIGINT) / 1000 GROUP BY day ORDER BY day

panels.title: Failure Rate Over Time (%)
panels.query: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', TO_TIMESTAMP(_timestamp / 1000000)) as day, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN gate_status = 'fail' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) as failure_pct FROM default WHERE service_name = 'dev-loop' AND operation_name LIKE 'gates.gate_%' AND _timestamp >= CAST(NOW() - INTERVAL '30 DAYS' AS BIGINT) / 1000 GROUP BY day ORDER BY day

panels.title: Recovery Time Trend (seconds)
panels.query: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', TO_TIMESTAMP(_timestamp / 1000000)) as day, ROUND(AVG(CAST(duration AS DOUBLE) / 1000000), 1) as avg_recovery_s FROM default WHERE service_name = 'dev-loop' AND operation_name = 'feedback.retry' AND _timestamp >= CAST(NOW() - INTERVAL '30 DAYS' AS BIGINT) / 1000 GROUP BY day ORDER BY day
